title: A Constructive Approach to a Class of Overdetermined Problems
summary: In this paper we study an overdetermined problem which is directly related to the well known torsion problem studied by J. Serrin. A perturbed version of the latter is tackled by using asymptotic series as well as tools borrowed from the celebrated Nekhoroshev Theorem. In a similar fashion to this class of results, we establish the existence of infinitely many approximants for the perturbed problem's solution, whose approximation error is so small which can be regarded as negligible for practical applications. The approach is fully constructive and this feature is demonstrated via an example in the final section.

AI.tldr: 利用渐近级数和Nekhoroshev定理工具，为Serrin扭转问题的扰动版本构造了无限多个近似解，其误差在实际应用中可忽略不计。
AI.motivation: 研究Serrin扭转问题的扰动版本，这是一个经典的过定问题，旨在寻找有效的近似解法来处理扰动情况下的数学分析。
AI.techniques: 使用渐近级数展开和Nekhoroshev定理的工具，采用完全构造性的方法建立近似解序列。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了扰动问题存在无限多个近似解，其近似误差足够小，在实际应用中可视为可忽略。
AI.significance: 为经典Serrin扭转问题的扰动版本提供了构造性解法，将Nekhoroshev定理的思想应用于PDE过定问题，具有理论和实际应用价值。

title: Diffusion bounds for non-autonomous degenerate parabolic equations
summary: We prove the Davies-Gaffney (i.e., integrated Nash-Aronson) type diffusive upper bounds on the propagators of parabolic equations in $L^p$-sense for all $1\le p\le\infty$. Our approach is based on a simple exponential deformation argument that does not require hypoellipticity. It provides a unified approach to diffusive upper bounds that covers a wide class of problems including degenerate, non-autonomous, and non-linear equations.

AI.tldr: 证明了抛物型方程传播子在所有L^p范数下的Davies-Gaffney型扩散上界估计
AI.motivation: 研究抛物型方程传播子的扩散上界估计问题，特别是Davies-Gaffney型（积分Nash-Aronson型）估计，旨在建立统一的框架来处理包括退化、非自治和非线性方程在内的广泛问题
AI.techniques: 基于简单的指数变形论证方法，该方法不需要椭圆性条件，提供了统一的处理框架
AI.main_theorems: 证明了抛物型方程传播子在所有1≤p≤∞的L^p意义下的Davies-Gaffney型扩散上界估计
AI.significance: 为退化、非自治和非线性抛物型方程提供了统一的扩散上界估计理论框架，推广了经典结果，具有广泛的应用价值

title: Blow-up of solutions to the Euler-Poisson-Darbox equation with critical power nonlinearity
summary: In our recent precious work, we established the finite time blow up result and upper bound of lifespan estimate to the singular Cauchy problem of semilinear Euler-Poisson-Darboux equation in R^n with subcritical power type nonlinearity. By introducing an improved test function, we obtain an enhanced lower bound for the functional including the spacetime integral of the nonlinear term with an additional logarithmic growth, which finally yields the blow up result and upper bound of lifespan estimate for the corresponding Cauchy problem with "critical" nonlinear power. And this gives some partial answer to the open problem 1 posed by D'Abbicco (J. Differential Equations 286 (2021), 531-556).

AI.tldr: 通过改进测试函数方法，建立了半线性Euler-Poisson-Darboux方程临界非线性幂次情形的有限时间爆破结果和寿命上界估计
AI.motivation: 研究R^n中具有亚临界幂型非线性的半线性Euler-Poisson-Darboux方程奇异柯西问题的有限时间爆破和寿命估计，特别是针对D'Abbicco在2021年提出的开放问题1中的临界非线性幂次情形
AI.techniques: 引入改进的测试函数方法，获得包含非线性项时空积分的泛函的增强下界估计，利用对数增长项处理临界情形
AI.main_theorems: 证明了对应柯西问题在临界非线性幂次情形下的有限时间爆破结果和寿命上界估计，部分回答了D'Abbicco提出的开放问题1
AI.significance: 解决了Euler-Poisson-Darboux方程临界非线性幂次情形的爆破理论，推进了该领域的发展，为相关波动方程的研究提供了新方法

title: Commutation Properties of Semi-groups for Contact Type Hamilton-Jacobi Equation
comment: 16 pages, this is a preliminary version
summary: We know that there exist semi-groups for contact type Hamilton-Jacobi equations, which refers to \cite{KLJ2}. Guy Barles and Agnès Tourin give a proof of the commutation properties for normal Hamilton-Jacobi equations at \cite{GA}. In this article, we provide a proof of the commutation property of semi-groups for contact type Hamilton-Jacobi equations.

AI.tldr: 证明了接触型Hamilton-Jacobi方程半群的交换性质
AI.motivation: 接触型Hamilton-Jacobi方程存在半群结构，但需要证明其交换性质；已有文献证明了正规Hamilton-Jacobi方程的交换性质，本文将其推广到接触型情形
AI.techniques: 利用接触型Hamilton-Jacobi方程的半群理论，借鉴Barles和Tourin对正规Hamilton-Jacobi方程交换性质的证明方法
AI.main_theorems: 建立了接触型Hamilton-Jacobi方程半群的交换性质定理，即两个半群算子可交换
AI.significance: 扩展了Hamilton-Jacobi方程半群理论，为接触型方程提供了更完整的数学基础，有助于研究其动力学性质和解的长期行为

title: A note on the non-existence of small non-trivial compact solutions for Euler-Poisson equation in 1D
summary: In this short note, we prove the non-existence of slow and fast small nontrivial compact solutions for the Euler-Poisson system in $1$D. The proof is based on the virial estimate which provides local in space average decay of bounded small solutions.

AI.tldr: 证明了1维欧拉-泊松系统中不存在慢速和快速的小非平凡紧支解
AI.motivation: 研究欧拉-泊松系统的解的存在性问题，特别是关注小振幅、紧支集的非平凡解在慢速和快速情况下的存在性
AI.techniques: 基于virial估计方法，利用局部空间平均衰减性质来证明解的非存在性
AI.main_theorems: 证明了1维欧拉-泊松系统不存在慢速和快速的小非平凡紧支解
AI.significance: 加深了对欧拉-泊松系统解性质的理解，为相关流体力学和等离子体物理模型提供了重要的数学基础

title: Classification of self-similar singular solutions with large mass for Keller-Segel model with signal consumption
summary:
In this paper, we concentrate on investigating the self-similar singular solutions of Keller-Segel model with signal consumption ($-uv^α$) and singular sensitivity. We perform a detailed exploration into the existence and decay rate of self-similar solutions, particularly, the permissibility of arbitrary mass for these solutions across all possible cases. Based on these findings, we can delve deeper into verifying that these self-similar solutions $(u, v)$ exhibit varying degrees of singularity depending on the value of $α$ and the spatial dimension.
  Our analysis reveals that the component $u$ (with arbitrary mass) of the solution consistently behaves analogous to heat kernel, that is, $u$ exhibiting a Dirac $δ$ initial singularity identical to that of the fundamental solution, and converges to $0$ in the sense of the $L^p$-norm ($p>1$) as time approaches infinity. However, the initial behavior of the other component $v$ varies significantly based on the value of $α$ and the spatial dimension, exhibiting regularity (not singular), less singularity, or strong singularity (more singular than fundamental solution). Moreover, both $u$ and $v$ undergo instantaneous smoothing, becoming smooth immediately after $t>0$. This phenomenon reveals the adaptive strategies of cells in high-density aggregation environments to prevent resource depletion, reflecting an optimization process of self-organizing behavior.

AI.tldr: 研究了带信号消耗和奇异敏感性的Keller-Segel模型自相似奇解的存在性、衰减率及质量任意性，揭示了u分量始终类似热核而v分量的奇异性随α和空间维数变化。
AI.motivation: 研究Keller-Segel模型（带信号消耗项-uv^α和奇异敏感性）的自相似奇解，探索细胞在高度聚集环境中防止资源耗竭的自适应策略，理解自组织行为的优化过程。
AI.techniques: 自相似解分析、奇异性分类、衰减率估计、L^p范数收敛性分析、瞬时光滑化现象研究。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 自相似解存在性及任意质量容许性；2) u分量始终具有Dirac δ初始奇异性且类似热核衰减；3) v分量的奇异性随α和空间维数变化（正则、弱奇异、强奇异）；4) 解在t>0时立即光滑化。
AI.significance: 揭示了Keller-Segel系统中信号消耗对奇异性结构的影响，为理解生物系统中细胞聚集与资源消耗的平衡机制提供了数学框架，对奇异PDE理论和生物数学有重要意义。

title: Self-similar Dynamics in the Critical $p$-Laplacian Patlak-Keller-Segel Model: Shrinking Blow-up and Expanding Propagation

AI.tldr: 证明了p-拉普拉斯Keller-Segel系统在临界指数m处存在有限时间爆破解，确认了该指数是全局存在与爆破的尖锐阈值。
AI.motivation: 研究具有p-拉普拉斯扩散的Patlak-Keller-Segel模型，该模型是经典Keller-Segel系统的推广，其中扩散项由线性扩散变为非线性p-拉普拉斯扩散。核心问题是确定临界指数m，该指数区分系统的全局有界性和有限时间爆破行为。
AI.techniques: 使用尺度不变性分析确定临界指数，构造自相似解（向后自相似爆破解和向前自相似解），通过径向对称性和紧支撑性质分析解的爆破行为，处理慢扩散(p>2)和快扩散(1<p≤2)两种不同情况。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在慢扩散情形(p>2)下，系统存在向后自相似爆破解，这些解径向递减、紧支撑，在爆破时刻T处集中为Dirac δ测度，支撑以速率(T-t)^{1/(mN)}收缩；2. 在快扩散情形(1<p≤2)下，不存在具有有限质量的向后自相似爆破解；3. 两种情形都存在向前自相似解，具有有限质量且在初始时刻呈现Dirac δ奇异性。
AI.significance: 这是首次对p≠2的p-拉普拉斯Keller-Segel系统进行爆破分析，确认了临界指数m的尖锐性，为理解非线性扩散对Keller-Segel系统爆破行为的影响提供了理论基础，对研究趋化模型中的奇异性形成机制有重要意义。

title: Double phase quasiconvex functionals and their partial regularity theory
summary: We consider degenerate nonautonomous energies $$ \int_Ωf(x, Dv)\, dx, $$ for vector-valued functions $v \in W^{1,1}(Ω, \mathbb{R}^N)$, where the integrand $f(x,P)$ satisfies growth and weak uniform quasiconvexity assumption associated with the double phase function $H(x,t)=t^p + a(x)t^q$. We establish partial Hölder regularity for the gradients of minimizers under suitable, and possibly minimal, regularity assumptions on $H$ and $f$. Our approach relies on two approximation results: $\mathcal{A}$-harmonic approximation and a variational version of the $φ$-harmonic approximation.

AI.tldr: 建立了双相函数H(x,t)=t^p+a(x)t^q相关的退化非自治能量极小化问题梯度部分Hölder正则性
AI.motivation: 研究向量值函数在双相函数框架下的退化非自治能量极小化问题，其中被积函数满足与双相函数相关的增长条件和弱一致拟凸性假设
AI.techniques: 使用两种逼近方法：𝒜-调和逼近和变分形式的φ-调和逼近，结合双相函数理论和退化椭圆正则性理论
AI.main_theorems: 在H和f满足适当且可能最小的正则性假设下，建立了极小化问题梯度的部分Hölder正则性
AI.significance: 扩展了双相函数框架下的正则性理论，为处理具有可变增长条件的退化椭圆问题提供了新的分析工具

title: Large-Amplitude Steady solitary water waves with general vorticity
comment: 43pp, 1 figure. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2110.04901 by other authors
summary: In this paper, we study two-dimensional steady solitary gravity waves propagating along the surface of a fluid of finite depth. In particular, we can deal with general vorticity distributions and overhanging wave profiles. By conformal mappings, we reformulate the problem into an overdetermined elliptic system coupled with an elliptic boundary value problem in a fixed strip domain. To avoid imposing extra constraints on vorticity function, we further reformulate the problem into the form of an abstract operator. Based on the formulations, the existence of small-amplitude solitary waves is proved by the center manifold reduction method, while the large-amplitude waves are obtained based on the analytic global bifurcation theorem.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了有限深度流体中具有一般涡量分布和悬垂波形的二维稳态孤立重力波的存在性
AI.motivation: 研究有限深度流体中二维稳态孤立重力波的存在性，特别关注一般涡量分布和悬垂波形，这是经典水波理论中的重要但具有挑战性的问题
AI.techniques: 使用保角映射将问题转化为固定带状域中的过定椭圆系统与椭圆边值问题的耦合；采用抽象算子形式避免对涡量函数的额外约束；结合中心流形约化方法证明小振幅波存在性，应用解析全局分歧定理获得大振幅波
AI.main_theorems: 证明了小振幅孤立波的存在性（通过中心流形约化方法）和大振幅孤立波的存在性（通过解析全局分歧定理），能够处理一般涡量分布和悬垂波形
AI.significance: 该研究扩展了孤立波理论，首次系统处理了具有一般涡量分布的悬垂波形，为水波动力学提供了更完整的数学框架，对海洋工程和流体力学有重要理论意义

title: Couette Taylor instabilities for counter-rotating cylinders in the small-gap regime
summary:
We study the Couette Taylor instabilities for an incompressible viscous fluid between two coaxial cylinders of nearly equal radii, allowing counter-rotation with the ratio of rotation rate $μ\in [-1,1]$. Working in a rotating frame and in a small-gap and small-viscosity regime, we derive the corresponding limiting Navier Stokes system and analyze the linear stability of the Couette flow. In particular, we numerically compute the critical Taylor number for general perturbations and identify a transition near $μ_c \approx -0.8$: for $μ> μ_c$ the most unstable mode is axisymmetric, whereas for $μ< μ_c$ the most unstable mode is non-axisymmetric.
  Near criticality, slowly varying traveling waves are governed by a time-independent Ginzburg Landau equation. The nonlinear coefficient changes sign near $\hatμ_c \approx -0.65$, yielding a supercritical regime for $μ> \hatμ_c$ and a subcritical regime for $μ_c < μ< \hatμ_c$. In the subcritical range, we classify small-amplitude steady states, including Taylor vortex flows, wavy vortices, a two-parameter family of quasi-periodic flows, and a localized traveling perturbation of the Couette flow.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了库埃特-泰勒不稳定性，发现了旋转率阈值μ_c≈-0.8处轴对称与非轴对称最不稳定模式的转变，以及在μ̂_c≈-0.65处超临界与亚临界分岔的转变。
AI.motivation: 研究两个共轴圆柱间不可压缩粘性流体的库埃特-泰勒不稳定性，考虑近等半径、小间隙、小粘度和反旋转（旋转率比μ∈[-1,1]）的情况，旨在理解旋转比对流动稳定性和分岔行为的影响。
AI.techniques: 采用旋转坐标系、小间隙和小粘度极限推导Navier-Stokes系统，进行线性稳定性分析，数值计算临界泰勒数，使用Ginzburg-Landau方程描述近临界慢变行波，分析非线性系数符号变化。
AI.main_theorems: 发现临界旋转率μ_c≈-0.8：当μ>μ_c时最不稳定模式为轴对称，μ<μ_c时为非轴对称；非线性系数在μ̂_c≈-0.65处变号，导致μ>μ̂_c为超临界分岔，μ_c<μ<μ̂_c为亚临界分岔；在亚临界区域分类了小振幅稳态解。
AI.significance: 揭示了反旋转圆柱间流动稳定性的双重转变机制，为理解旋转流体动力学中的模式选择和分岔行为提供了重要理论框架，对旋转机械设计和流动控制有应用价值。

title: Minimum principles and a priori estimates for 2-Hessian problems
summary: In this paper we investigate a class of $2$-Hessian equations and establish a minimum principle for a $P$-function in the sense of L.E. Payne (see R. Sperb \cite{Sp81}). The analysis is based on a sharp matrix inequality providing an estimate for a suitable combination of second-order partial derivatives of the solution. Exploiting this estimate, we derive a differential inequality for the associated $P$-function and obtain a minimum principle in higher dimensions under a convexity assumption. As an application of our results, together with convexity results established in X.-N. Ma and L. Xu \cite{MX08}, P. Liu, X.-N. Ma and L. Xu \cite{LMX10}, P. Salani \cite{Sa12}, and Y. Ye \cite{Ye13}, we derive a priori bounds for solutions of several classical $2$-Hessian boundary value problems.

AI.tldr: 建立了2-Hessian方程P-函数的最小值原理，并应用于推导经典2-Hessian边值问题的先验估计
AI.motivation: 研究2-Hessian方程这类重要的非线性偏微分方程，建立类似L.E. Payne的P-函数最小值原理，为相关边值问题提供分析工具
AI.techniques: 基于尖锐矩阵不等式估计解的二阶偏导数组合，推导P-函数的微分不等式，利用凸性假设建立高维最小值原理
AI.main_theorems: 建立了2-Hessian方程P-函数的最小值原理；结合已有凸性结果，推导了多个经典2-Hessian边值问题的先验估计
AI.significance: 扩展了Payne型P-函数方法到2-Hessian方程，为这类非线性椭圆型方程的正则性理论和先验估计提供了新工具

title: Regularity of Solutions to Beckmann's Parametric Optimal Transport
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2503.10729
summary: Beckmann's problem in optimal transport minimizes the total squared flux in a continuous transport problem from a source to a target distribution. In this article, the regularity theory for solutions to Beckmann's problem in optimal transport is developed utilizing an unconstrained Lagrangian formulation and solving the variational first order optimality conditions. It turns out that the Lagrangian multiplier that enforces Beckmann's divergence constraint fulfills a Poisson equation and the flux vector field is obtained as the potential's gradient. Utilizing Schauder estimates from elliptic regularity theory, the exact Hölder regularity of the potential, the flux and the flow generating is derived on the basis of Hölder regularity of source and target densities on a bounded, regular domain. If the target distribution depends on parameters, as is the case in conditional (``promptable'') generative learning, we provide sufficient conditions for separate and joint Hölder continuity of the resulting vector field in the parameter and the data dimension. Following a recent result by Belomnestny et al., one can thus approximate such vector fields with deep ReQu neural networks in C^(k,alpha)-Hölder norm. We also show that this approach generalizes to other probability paths, like Fisher-Rao gradient flows.

AI.tldr: 建立了Beckmann最优输运问题的正则性理论，并推广到参数依赖的生成学习场景
AI.motivation: 研究Beckmann最优输运问题的解的正则性，该问题最小化连续输运中的总平方通量，特别关注参数依赖的生成学习应用
AI.techniques: 无约束拉格朗日公式化、变分一阶最优性条件、椭圆正则性理论的Schauder估计、Hölder连续性分析
AI.main_theorems: 基于源和目标密度的Hölder正则性，推导出势函数、通量场和流生成的精确Hölder正则性；对参数依赖的目标分布，给出向量场在参数和数据维度上分别和联合Hölder连续性的充分条件
AI.significance: 为Beckmann问题建立了系统的正则性理论，为条件生成学习提供了数学基础，使深度ReQu神经网络在C^(k,α)-Hölder范数下的近似成为可能，并可推广到其他概率路径如Fisher-Rao梯度流

title: Curved fronts of combustion reaction-diffusion equations
summary: This paper is concerned with curved fronts of combustion reaction-diffusion equations in $\mathbb{R}^N$ $(N\geq2)$. By mixing finite planar fronts and constructing suitable super- and subsolutions, we prove the existence, uniqueness and stability of polytope-like curved fronts in $\mathbb{R}^N$. Besides, we show that these curved fronts are transition fronts.

AI.tldr: 证明了在ℝ^N中多面体状弯曲燃烧波前解的存在性、唯一性和稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究燃烧反应扩散方程在ℝ^N中的弯曲波前解，特别是多面体状波前，这类解在燃烧理论和传播现象中具有重要意义
AI.techniques: 混合有限平面波前，构造合适的上解和下解，利用比较原理和稳定性分析方法
AI.main_theorems: 证明了多面体状弯曲波前解的存在性、唯一性和稳定性，并证明这些弯曲波前是过渡波前
AI.significance: 扩展了燃烧波前理论，为复杂几何形状的传播现象提供了数学基础，在燃烧理论、传播动力学和模式形成中有重要应用

title: Stability analysis and long-time convergence of a partial differential equation model of two-phase ageing
summary: Recent biological evidence suggests the presence of a two-phase ageing process in several species. We introduce a system of two age-structured partial differential equations (PDE) representing two phases of ageing of a wild population. The model includes a coupling of both equations through birth and transition between phases and non-linearities due to competition. We show the existence, positivity and uniqueness of weak solutions in a general setting. For a simplified system of ordinary differential equations (ODE), we show existence and uniqueness of a strictly positive steady state attracting all trajectories. We study another simplification, a coupled PDE-ODE model, for which we prove existence, uniqueness and local asymptotic stability of a strictly positive steady state. Under further assumptions, but without assuming weak non-linearities, we show the global asymptotic stability of that steady state. The uniqueness of steady states and absence of oscillations in these systems show that the proportion of individuals in each phase at equilibrium is a unique feature of the model. This paves the way to ecological applications as the experimental measure of such a proportion could help gain some insight on the health of a wild population.

AI.tldr: 建立了描述两阶段衰老过程的年龄结构PDE系统，证明了弱解的存在唯一性，并分析了简化模型的稳态及其稳定性。
AI.motivation: 基于生物学证据表明多个物种存在两阶段衰老过程，需要建立数学模型来描述野生种群中两个衰老阶段的动态，并研究其稳态行为。
AI.techniques: 使用年龄结构偏微分方程系统、弱解理论、稳态分析、局部和全局渐近稳定性理论、ODE简化分析、PDE-ODE耦合模型分析。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 一般PDE系统弱解的存在性、正性和唯一性；2. 简化ODE系统存在唯一正稳态且吸引所有轨迹；3. PDE-ODE耦合模型存在唯一正稳态且局部渐近稳定；4. 在进一步假设下证明该稳态的全局渐近稳定性。
AI.significance: 为两阶段衰老过程的生物学现象提供了严格的数学框架，证明了稳态的唯一性和无振荡特性，为生态应用提供了理论基础，可通过测量各阶段比例来评估种群健康状况。

title: Asymptotics of the principal eigenvalue of an elliptic operator on closed and orientable Riemannian manifolds
summary:
This paper investigates the asymptotic behavior of the principal eigenvalue $λ(s)$, as $s\to+\infty$, for the following elliptic eigenvalue problem \begin{equation*}\label{E}
  -Δ_{M}u-s\langle \nabla_M f, \nabla_M u\rangle_g +c u=λ(s)u, \end{equation*} defined on an orientable and closed Riemannian manifold $(M,g)$. Assuming $f$ is a Morse function defined on $M$, we find that the limit $\lim\limits_{s\to+\infty} λ(s)$ is determined by the minimum value of the function $c$ over the set of the maximum points of $f$, a result that is independent of the curvature of manifold.

AI.tldr: 证明了在黎曼流形上带漂移项的椭圆特征值问题的主特征值当漂移强度趋于无穷时的极限由函数c在f最大值点集上的最小值决定
AI.motivation: 研究黎曼流形上带漂移项的椭圆特征值问题的渐近行为，特别是当漂移强度参数s趋于无穷时主特征值的极限行为，这类问题在概率论、统计力学和量子力学中有重要应用
AI.techniques: 利用Morse函数理论、渐近分析、变分原理，可能涉及WKB近似或半经典分析技术，以及黎曼几何中的梯度流方法
AI.main_theorems: 当s→∞时，主特征值λ(s)的极限等于函数c在f的最大值点集上的最小值，且该结果与流形的曲率无关
AI.significance: 建立了带漂移椭圆算子的半经典极限与底层几何结构的精确关系，为理解大漂移极限下的谱性质提供了理论基础，在随机过程、统计力学和量子隧穿问题中有潜在应用

title: Existence, non-degeneracy and local uniqueness of multi-peak solutions to the fractional Schrödinger equation with nearly critical exponent in $\mathbb{R}^N$
summary: In this paper, we consider the following fractional Schrödinger equation \begin{equation*} \left\{ \begin{array}{lcl} (-Δ)^{s}u+V(x)u=u^{{p_s}-ε}\ \ \ &\hbox{in}\ \mathbb{R}^N,\\ u>0\ \ \ &\hbox{in}\ \mathbb{R}^N, \end{array} \right. \end{equation*} where $0<s<1$, $ε>0$, $p_s=(N+2s)/(N-2s)$, $N>4s$ and $V(x)\in C^1(\mathbb{R}^N)\cap L^\infty (\mathbb{R}^N)$ is non-negative. We first use the Lyapunov-Schmidt reduction method to construct multi-peak solutions to the above equation provided that $V(x)$ possesses $k$ stable critical points. Then we prove the non-degeneracy and local uniqueness of the multi-peak solutions, for $\frac{1}{2}<s<1$, $N\geq 6s$, via the blow-up argument based on various local Pohozaev identities. Due to the nonlocal property of the fractional Laplacian, we need to make delicate analysis of the approximate solutions and establish the local Pohozaev identities for the corresponding harmonic extension instead of $u$. This approach not only requires to develop refined estimates for several integrals in the local Pohozaev identities, but also to apply Pohozaev identities through a markedly different way.

AI.tldr: 研究分数阶薛定谔方程多峰解的非退化性与局部唯一性
AI.motivation: 研究分数阶薛定谔方程在临界指数附近的多峰解存在性、非退化性和局部唯一性问题，特别是当势函数V(x)具有多个稳定临界点时
AI.techniques: Lyapunov-Schmidt约化方法、爆破论证、局部Pohozaev恒等式、调和延拓技术、精细积分估计
AI.main_theorems: 1. 当V(x)具有k个稳定临界点时，构造多峰解；2. 证明多峰解的非退化性和局部唯一性（对1/2<s<1, N≥6s）
AI.significance: 发展了分数阶算子非局部性质下的新分析方法，建立了局部Pohozaev恒等式的新应用方式，为分数阶方程多峰解理论提供了重要工具

title: Regularity criterion for the 3D generalized Newtonian fluids
summary: In this paper, we prove that a weak solution of the Cauchy problem for 3D unsteady flows of a generalized Newtonian fluid becomes a strong solution for $\frac{5}{3} <p<\frac{11}{5} $ provided that the gradient of velocity $\nabla \boldsymbol{u}$ belongs to the critical space $L^{\frac{2}{2-(3-p)a}}(0,T;\dot{B}^{-a}_{\infty,\infty}(\mathbb{R}^3))$, where $a\in(\frac{3}{2},\frac{2}{3-p})$ if $p\in(\frac{5}{3},2)$ and $a\in(\frac{1}{p},\frac{2}{3-p})$ if $p\in[2,\frac{11}{5})$.

AI.tldr: 证明了三维非定常广义牛顿流体弱解在特定参数范围内，当速度梯度属于临界Besov空间时，会提升为强解
AI.motivation: 研究三维广义牛顿流体（非牛顿流体）Cauchy问题中弱解的正则性提升条件，特别是当指数p在5/3到11/5之间时，速度梯度在临界Besov空间中的条件如何保证弱解变为强解
AI.techniques: 使用临界Besov空间理论、能量估计、Littlewood-Paley分解、Fourier分析，以及广义牛顿流体模型的非线性分析技术
AI.main_theorems: 主要定理：对于5/3 < p < 11/5的三维非定常广义牛顿流体，若速度梯度∇u属于临界空间L^{2/[2-(3-p)a]}(0,T; Ḃ^{-a}_{∞,∞}(ℝ³))，其中a的取值依赖于p的范围，则弱解提升为强解
AI.significance: 为广义牛顿流体正则性理论提供了新的临界空间条件，扩展了弱解提升为强解的参数范围，对非牛顿流体数学理论有重要贡献

title: Asymptotic stability of shear flows for 2D Euler equations at Yudovich regularity
summary:
The nonlinear asymptotic stability of shear flows in the 2D Euler equations has traditionally been linked to inviscid damping in the periodic setting. Since Gevrey regularity is required to suppress the ``echo'' phenomenon, asymptotic stability is known to be impossible in Sobolev spaces.
  In this paper, we identify a distinct stabilizing mechanism available in the infinite channel: the advection of vorticity to spatial infinity. We establish nonlinear asymptotic stability for the 2D Euler equations in the infinite channel $\mathbb{R}\times[0,1]$ at the minimal regularity of the Yudovich class ($L^{\infty}$ vorticity). Specifically, for a class of non-negative shear flows with a curvature bound, any $L^\infty$-small, compactly supported vorticity perturbation leads to decay on compact subsets and weak convergence to zero.

AI.tldr: 证明了无限通道中2D欧拉方程在Yudovich类最小正则性下的非线性渐近稳定性
AI.motivation: 传统上2D欧拉方程中剪切流的非线性渐近稳定性与周期设置中的无粘阻尼相关，但Sobolev空间中不可能实现渐近稳定性。本文发现在无限通道中存在不同的稳定机制：涡度向空间无穷远处的平流。
AI.techniques: 利用无限通道的特殊几何结构，通过涡度向无穷远处的平流机制，在Yudovich类最小正则性条件下建立稳定性，避免了传统方法对Gevrey正则性的要求。
AI.main_theorems: 对于满足曲率有界条件的非负剪切流类，任何L∞小、紧支集的涡度扰动都会导致紧子集上的衰减和弱收敛到零，从而建立了非线性渐近稳定性。
AI.significance: 首次在无限通道几何中证明了2D欧拉方程在Yudovich类最小正则性下的非线性渐近稳定性，揭示了不同于周期设置的稳定机制，突破了传统方法对高正则性的要求。

title: An eigenvalue problem for a nonlocal quasilinear anisotropic equation in fractional Orlicz Sobolev spaces without the $Δ_2$--condition
summary: In this paper we analyze an eigenvalue problem associated to fractional operators of the form \[ L_a^s u(x)=2 \text{p.v.}\int_{\mathbb{R}^n}a(x,y,D^su(x,y))\,\frac{dy}{|x-y|^{n+s}},\] which represents a generalization model for nonlocal, nonstandard growth diffusion problems. We study this problem in the context of the fractional Orlicz Sobolev spaces without assuming the so-called $Δ_2$--condition on the Young functions involved. We show existence of a sequence of eigenpairs $(u_k,λ_k)\to (0,+\infty)$.

AI.tldr: 研究分数阶Orlicz-Sobolev空间中一类广义非局部非标准增长扩散算子的特征值问题，在无Δ₂条件下证明特征对序列的存在性
AI.motivation: 本文研究一类广义分数阶算子L_a^s的特征值问题，该算子是非局部、非标准增长扩散问题的推广模型。主要动机是在更一般的框架下（无Δ₂条件）研究这类算子的谱性质，这扩展了传统分数阶p-Laplacian和分数阶Orlicz-Sobolev空间理论。
AI.techniques: 使用分数阶Orlicz-Sobolev空间理论，结合变分方法和临界点理论，在无Δ₂条件下处理非标准增长问题。主要技术包括：处理广义分数阶算子、在Orlicz框架下建立紧性结果、应用变分原理构造特征值序列。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了存在一列特征对序列{(u_k, λ_k)}，满足λ_k → +∞，u_k → 0，其中λ_k为特征值，u_k为对应的特征函数。这是在无Δ₂条件下对广义分数阶算子的谱存在性结果。
AI.significance: 扩展了分数阶算子的谱理论到更一般的非标准增长框架，突破了传统Δ₂条件的限制，为研究非局部、非标准增长扩散问题提供了新的理论工具，在非局部偏微分方程和变分问题中有重要应用价值。

title: Global solutions to cross-diffusion systems with independent advections in one dimension
summary: We consider cross-diffusion systems describing evolution of two species $u$ and $v$ moving according to the Darcy's law with the pressure law $p(s) = \frac{1}{α-1} s^{α-1}$ where $s=u+v$. One of the most challenging questions in the field is the construction of solutions to the problem in the presence of additional advection fields, without imposing any artificial structure (for instance, preventing the species from mixing). Although advection arises naturally in these models, it breaks the symmetry of the system and prevents application of techniques developed in recent years. Here, we provide a new approach to construct solutions in one space dimension that works in a unified manner for all pressure exponents $α\in (0,\infty)$ and for arbitrary initial data (segregated, mixed, or partially mixed). In particular, in the regime $α> 1$, this yields the first existence result of its kind, obtained without any structural assumptions. We construct the solutions as a limit of a vanishing viscosity approximation $(u_{\varepsilon}, v_{\varepsilon})$. The main challenge is to identify the limit of $u_{\varepsilon} \, \partial_x p(s_{\varepsilon})$, where $s_{\varepsilon} = u_{\varepsilon} + v_{\varepsilon}$. The key new insight is that possible oscillations of $u_\varepsilon$ and $\partial_x p(s_\varepsilon)$ are correlated, simplifying the Young measure analysis in the compensated compactness argument and allowing identification of the limit.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种统一处理所有压力指数α∈(0,∞)的一维交叉扩散系统存在性理论的新方法，首次在不施加任何结构假设的情况下解决了含对流项的存在性问题。
AI.motivation: 研究Darcy定律下两种物种交叉扩散系统，压力定律为p(s)=1/(α-1)s^{α-1}，其中s=u+v。该领域最具挑战性的问题之一是在存在附加对流场的情况下构造解，而不施加任何人工结构（如防止物种混合）。对流项破坏了系统对称性，使近年发展的技术无法应用。
AI.techniques: 采用消失粘度逼近(u_ε, v_ε)构造解，关键创新在于发现u_ε和∂_xp(s_ε)的振荡具有相关性，这简化了补偿紧致性论证中的Young测度分析，从而能够识别极限。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了一维空间中所有压力指数α∈(0,∞)和任意初始数据（分离、混合或部分混合）的统一存在性理论。特别地，在α>1的范围内，这是首次在不施加任何结构假设的情况下获得此类存在性结果。
AI.significance: 突破了含对流项交叉扩散系统存在性理论的瓶颈，为处理更一般的交叉扩散问题提供了新框架。统一处理所有压力指数和初始数据的能力具有重要理论价值，可能推动相关领域的发展。
